probes.description: Model writes a byte-exact marker file with no extra bytes.
Model fails honestly on missing input instead of fabricating summary.txt.
Model stays resident across ADP slices, waits for a late release, then writes a byte-exact file.
Model honors a mid-run cancel and leaves no output behind.

soak_extension.note: soak_verdict automation is out of the Factory MVP scope (DESIGN Scope OUT). A soak extension would repeat loop_survival_task and cancel_while_running over a long window to score residency stability; it is intentionally not part of this pack and is judged not_started by the ledger.

authoring_rules.rule: Every pass_criteria uses only the Decision 2 vocabulary (result_status, artifact_matches, artifact_absent, min_elapsed_s). No probe requires semantic OA judgment or validate --record.
Negative-expectation probes assert artifact_absent on the canary path the model must not create, never merely a non-succeeded status.
Every task template is completable strictly within its cwd-scoped read/write permissions with network false; no probe needs paths, commands, or network outside its authority bounds.
Probe outcomes depend only on the ResultContract, the probe workspace files, and verifier-recorded publish time; no external services, clocks, or shared mutable state are consulted.
Probes measure the model-adherence axis (exactness, honesty, residency, cancel-obedience) and never the transport, registry, or runtime harness plumbing.

instantiation.note: task_id and cwd are injected by the Factory verifier at publish time; task templates deliberately omit both.

placeholders.{{cwd}}: The resolved absolute path of the per-probe workspace the verifier creates. Substitute it in permissions.read and permissions.write before publishing. It is the only placeholder used.

instantiation.artifact_paths: artifact_matches[].path_basename is matched against the basename of each declared result artifact; artifact_absent[] paths are resolved relative to the probe workspace (the instantiated cwd).
